mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name AS serviceName, s.base_price AS price, s.service_area AS serviceArea, s.unit AS unit, m.name AS merchantName, IFNULL(AVG(c.star), 0.0) AS avgStar, s.cover_image AS coverImage, s.subtitle AS description, s.id AS serviceId FROM services s LEFT JOIN service_comment c ON s.id = c.service_id LEFT JOIN service_merchant m ON s.merchant_id = m.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND ( JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, CONCAT('"', #{district}, '"')) OR JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, CONCAT('"', #{city}, '"')) OR JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, CONCAT('"', #{province}, '"')) OR JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, '"全国"') ) GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.base_price, s.service_area, m.name ORDER BY avgStar DESC, CASE WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, CONCAT('"', #{district}, '"')) THEN 1 WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, CONCAT('"', #{city}, '"')) THEN 2 WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, CONCAT('"', #{province}, '"')) THEN 3 WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(s.service_area, '"全国"') THEN 4 ELSE 5 END ASC LIMIT #{limit}
